
 
 
## *************adam-bulk-30*************** ##
 
 
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
fig = plt.figure()
ax = fig.add_subplot(111, projection='3d')
p = 0.2
SNR = 15
N = 30
f = 10
initial_pos = np.array([[502.5692138671875, 340.8625183105469, -144.28118896484375], [-599.7696533203125, 456.2294006347656, 53.70214080810547], [354.4998779296875, -66.35267639160156, 97.8691635131836], [161.74661254882812, 447.2278747558594, 82.59571838378906], [251.31666564941406, 192.68399047851562, 58.86899948120117], [102.57393646240234, -253.47471618652344, -111.80686950683594], [123.44758605957031, -21.419328689575195, -221.57077026367188], [-25.686933517456055, -65.33047485351562, 209.89178466796875], [576.7518920898438, -419.494384765625, 89.9949722290039], [209.65997314453125, -27.078214645385742, 163.2097625732422], [486.3930358886719, 310.47442626953125, 7.042784690856934], [213.70455932617188, 89.92638397216797, -191.7989501953125], [350.7157897949219, 161.8834991455078, -30.099132537841797], [386.44293212890625, -68.06858825683594, -88.11537170410156], [298.6753845214844, -112.09976959228516, -15.260372161865234], [330.07220458984375, -211.73097229003906, -74.4178695678711], [418.7557678222656, 439.76873779296875, 104.30168151855469], [-870.4837036132812, 298.7258605957031, 57.918182373046875], [365.84429931640625, 496.1040344238281, -91.29327392578125], [527.7219848632812, 276.1877746582031, 159.41773986816406], [658.5999755859375, -358.5292663574219, 127.03663635253906], [500.7043151855469, -421.2588195800781, 160.06497192382812], [568.7283325195312, -189.5477752685547, 225.5454559326172], [616.3870849609375, 441.0054016113281, -35.11676025390625], [95.7171630859375, 175.29446411132812, 155.35850524902344], [649.926513671875, -114.7409896850586, -47.10292434692383], [142.3885498046875, -73.41452026367188, -139.20419311523438], [173.99566650390625, -129.0180206298828, 74.5292739868164], [374.34771728515625, 109.9735107421875, 214.4944305419922], [163.08053588867188, 134.8477783203125, 49.01236343383789]])
optimizer_options = {"learning rate": 1.0}
Energy = 0.11695372313261032
e2 = 64.12*np.array([0.5,np.sqrt(3)/2,0])
e1 = 64.12*np.array([1,0,0])
e3 = 536.35*np.array([0.5,np.sqrt(3)/2,0])
e4 = 536.35*np.array([1,0,0])
FinalState30 = np.array([[551.68994140625, 269.78167724609375, -161.78884887695312], [-350.7795104980469, 418.1827087402344, -0.06788641214370728], [301.9273986816406, -124.02214050292969, 132.05397033691406], [445.4223937988281, 428.63067626953125, 102.14200592041016], [118.5691909790039, 198.42176818847656, -95.79971313476562], [75.32794189453125, -244.66859436035156, -0.6514555811882019], [58.16535949707031, 42.850955963134766, -168.4484405517578], [57.26591110229492, 42.064823150634766, 168.94058227539062], [569.8485717773438, -380.24127197265625, -53.59357833862305], [227.2793731689453, 55.74992370605469, 170.4927520751953], [499.0589599609375, 296.2845458984375, 0.07725010067224503], [227.69825744628906, 56.491878509521484, -170.54159545898438], [279.94610595703125, 142.60475158691406, -0.04876943305134773], [301.9139099121094, -122.64424896240234, -131.17779541015625], [244.69393920898438, -270.9465026855469, 85.12355041503906], [245.11412048339844, -269.5719909667969, -86.08148956298828], [552.4395141601562, 268.111328125, 161.4499053955078], [-871.6603393554688, 424.6059875488281, -21.31917381286621], [444.8145446777344, 429.6537780761719, -100.37159729003906], [612.5498657226562, 174.0459442138672, -0.6922459006309509], [709.2987670898438, -401.666015625, 0.20789645612239838], [568.2779541015625, -382.7718811035156, 49.910400390625], [628.0186157226562, -290.42095947265625, 61.164268493652344], [669.9876098632812, 424.369873046875, 0.24880382418632507], [118.62667083740234, 197.7173614501953, 96.30091094970703], [630.1022338867188, -287.08416748046875, -57.130348205566406], [114.46012115478516, -116.39786529541016, -135.2713165283203], [114.20884704589844, -117.21300506591797, 135.11016845703125], [304.60919189453125, -28.723276138305664, 0.49667835235595703], [84.26525115966797, 11.72424030303955, 0.1301211714744568]])
FinalState30 = FinalState30.reshape(N,3)
ax.scatter(FinalState30[:,0],FinalState30[:,1],FinalState30[:,2],c='g', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e1[0],e1[1],e1[2],c='r', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e2[0],e2[1],e2[2],c='r', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e3[0],e3[1],e3[2],c='r', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e4[0],e4[1],e4[2],c='r', marker='o')
plt.plot([0,e4[0]], [0,e4[1]], '--', c='k')
plt.plot([0, e3[0]], [0, e3[1]], '--', c = 'k')
plt.show()
plt.xlabel('x')
plt.ylabel('y')
ax.set_zlabel('z')
ax.set_title('Energie='+str(np.round(Energy,4)))
